Representations: Target represents that PAN collections use offline verification only; no biometric A a d h a a r authentication is enabled; privacy incident register shows zero open items; past breach reports closed.

must_detect.matched_text:
Term Sheet — Proposed Acquisition of Varuna Microsystems Limited by Palmyra Infocom Private Limited (India)
Issuer/Target: Varuna Microsystems Limited (listed on Rashtra Securities Exchange: symbol “VRN”) — contact: ir@varunamicro.example.in; attention Mr. Raghav Sen (CFO).
Transaction: All-cash acquisition of up to 74.5% of fully diluted share capital; signing subject to Indian insider trading and PIT code compliance; no UPSI will be disclosed before clean team access.
Regulatory/Listing: filings to the national securities regulator and RSE; trading window norms observed; no communication to analysts beyond public-source materials; no MAC clause requested by acquirer.
Privacy & DPDPA: Schedule DPA-1 (data processing addendum) and Compliance Memo CM-7 incorporated; onboarding form OF-12 includes consent language and child (under 18) opt-in by guardian.
PII handling: no Aadhaar numbers will be collected in the VDR, PANs/GSTINs are redacted (e.g., P A N: Q T P P A  1 2 3 4 Z; GSTIN: 27-V A R U N A-0 0 0 1-Z5); bank a/c masked; KiranPay customer app logs minimised.
Cross-Border Transfer: personal data export to Palmyra group processors in Singapore requires Data-Export Approval DEA/SG/2026-011; transfer under contractual safeguards consistent with DPDPA; approval completed 03-Apr-2026.
DSAR/Erasure: all outstanding DSARs as of 31-Mar-2026 have been closed; one consent withdrawal (Ref CW-8891) executed with erasure confirmed on 01-Apr-2026; nothing remains pending.
Retention/Minimisation: retention schedule RS-IND-18 months applies to onboarding scans; A a d h a a r images not stored; payroll PAN hashes retained for 7 years; minimisation audit memo “Audit-PRV-09” filed.
MNPI controls: clean team members named in Schedule CT-2; emails routed via dealroom@palmyra.example.com; no board-level projections or unpublished price-sensitive information in the initial data room.
Conditions Precedent: DPDPA consent notices dispatched; sectoral approvals under telecom sandbox (if any) confirmed as not applicable; completion not conditional on DSAR outcomes already resolved.
Employee/Child Data: no hiring of minors; internship forms flag age <18; guardian consent template annexed; completed-control note: the child data collection toggle is disabled by default and locked.
Data Room: hosted at https://dealroom.example.in/export?id=9f-2c&cust=vrn-ltd (read-only); access logs retained 90 days; documented cross-border sync not active unless export flag is true.
Representations: Target represents that PAN collections use offline verification only; no biometric A a d h a a r authentication is enabled; privacy incident register shows zero open items; past breach reports closed.
Miscellaneous: governed by laws of India; disputes seated in Bengaluru; notices to companysecretary@varunamicro.example.in and to Mr. Ajay B. Rao, Palmyra Infocom Pvt. Ltd., 14B Stonefield Tech Park, Kashi Nagar, Nilgiri—560199.
must_detect.reason: promoted from strict runtime finding during Stage B baseline reconciliation
